chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-199 and D-373 of 2023 M/s Crop Tech Agri Services AND M/s Agrimore (Pvt.) Ltd. Versus Federation of Pakistan & others Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of Misc. No.770/23 2. For hearing of main case Dated: 21.03.2023 M/s Imran Iqbal and Aneel Zia for petitioners. Qazi Ayazuddin, Assistant Attorney General along with Dr. Muhammad Tariq Khan and Ms. Zaeema Khan, Director and Deputy Director respectively of Plant Protection Department. Mr. Aamir Ali Shah for respondent department. -.-.- Compliance report on behalf of respondent No.3 is filed in Court today, which is taken on record. A sealed envelope of concerned lab is sent through covering letter, which is opened in presence of counsels. It contains the reports, which are taken on record. Respondents shall now deal with the subject consignments in terms of the reports and analyses contained therein. Petitions, in view of above, stand disposed of along with pending applications. Judge Judge
